title: Jon's Create Adventures
description: A Create-centered modpack with extra building and adventuring mods.
body:
## What am I?
Jon's Create Adventures is a modpack focused on the Create mod, alongside plenty of building and adventure mods.

I am designed from the ground up to be a fun combination of mods to play on SMP servers, ranging from a couple of friends playing together to larger tens of players.

### Interested in joining an SMP that uses this modpack?
Jon's Minecraft Adventures would be the SMP for you! Since the modpack is originally designed for our server, look no further, [click on me to join our discord! :D](https://discord.gg/6KBR3Ee8ba)

### Interested in hosting this modpack for yourself?
With amazing support, performance and uptime, I highly suggest
[Kinetic Hosting! (Affiliate Link)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=219)

![Get 15 percent off your first month with Code: "Griind" at checkout.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f42c7238170d07a6ea27c28caf8f666414b81a3_0.webp)
